title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Hubtown

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Hubtown
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Hubtown in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hubtown:
Hubtown is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hubtown!
